'''zhashafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thallinocarp|thallinocarp]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-sh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thallinocarp|thallinocarp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhashafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæshæfæth|zhæshæfæth]] || [[word:zhæshæfæj|zhæshæfæj]] || [[word:zhæshæfæsh|zhæshæfæsh]] || [[word:zhæshæfæ|zhæshæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhashashafath|zhashashafath]] || [[word:zhashashafaj|zhashashafaj]] || [[word:zhashashafash|zhashashafash]] || [[word:zhashashafa|zhashashafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhashafath|zhashafath]] || [[word:zhashafaj|zhashafaj]] || [[word:zhashafash|zhashafash]] || [[word:zhashafa|zhashafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhashaffath|zhashaffath]] || [[word:zhashaffaj|zhashaffaj]] || [[word:zhashaffash|zhashaffash]] || [[word:zhashaffaf|zhashaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhashafatha|zhashafatha]] || [[word:zhashafaja|zhashafaja]] || [[word:zhashafasha|zhashafasha]] || [[word:zhashafaka|zhashafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhashafath|zhashafath]] || [[word:zhashafaj|zhashafaj]] || [[word:zhashafash|zhashafash]] || [[word:zhashafa|zhashafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhashafathal|zhashafathal]] || [[word:zhashafajal|zhashafajal]] || [[word:zhashafashal|zhashafashal]] || [[word:zhashafakal|zhashafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhashafathatha|zhashafathatha]] || [[word:zhashafajaja|zhashafajaja]] || [[word:zhashafashasha|zhashafashasha]] || [[word:zhashafaka|zhashafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhashafathan|zhashafathan]] || [[word:zhashafajan|zhashafajan]] || [[word:zhashafashan|zhashafashan]] || [[word:zhashafakan|zhashafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhashafathaoro|zhashafathaoro]] || [[word:zhashafajaoro|zhashafajaoro]] || [[word:zhashafashaoro|zhashafashaoro]] || [[word:zhashafakaoro|zhashafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
